commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the Worker workspace terminal bootstrap to run the initial command, clear setup noise, report its exit status, and then fall back to a reusable login shell, with Worker tests and an Unreleased changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main writes a bootstrap that ends with `exec bash -lc <command>`, so a finite initial command exits the terminal process. I did not run a live workspace because this review is read-only.
